
\newpage

```{r sf-header, warning=FALSE, message=FALSE, out.width="900px"}
header_file_create("OM", "Sand Fraction")
knitr::include_graphics(here(root_figure_location, "headers", "om_testing_sand_fraction_plot.png"))
```

```{r sf-table, ft.align="left"}
usga_specs <- tribble(
  ~measurement_name,                                       ~usga_spec,
  "Coarse Sand + Medium Sand (0.5 mm + 0.25 mm)",          "≥ 60 %",
  "Fine Gravel (2.0 mm)",                                  "≤ 3 %",
  "Fine Gravel + Very Coarse Sand (2.0 mm + 1.0 mm)",      "≤ 10 %",
  "Fine Sand (0.15 mm)",                                   "≤ 20 %",
  "Very Fine Sand + Very Fine Sand (0.106 mm + 0.053 mm)", "≤ 5 %"
)

sf_data <- full_database %>%
  filter(sample_description_number_1 == "SF") %>%
  mutate(
    depth = ifelse(str_detect(sample_description_number_3, "[0-9]-[0-9]"), # depth info either in desc3 or desc4 column
                   sample_description_number_3,
                   sample_description_number_4),
    year = lubridate::year(date_sample_submitted),
    month = lubridate::month(date_sample_submitted),
    depth = as.character(glue::glue("{depth} cm"))
  ) %>%
  filter(site == input_params$site_name) %>%
  filter(month %in% season) %>%
  mutate(
    measurement_name = stringr::str_remove_all(measurement_name, " \\(%\\)"),
    measurement_name = stringr::str_replace(measurement_name, " - ", " ("),
    measurement_name = stringr::str_replace(measurement_name, " mm$", " mm)")
  ) %>%
  select(depth, measurement_name, year, measurement_result) %>%
  group_by(depth) %>%
  pivot_wider(names_from = year, values_from = measurement_result) %>%
  ungroup() |> 
  left_join(usga_specs) |> 
  mutate(usga_spec = ifelse(is.na(usga_spec), "", usga_spec)) |> 
  select(depth, measurement_name, usga_spec, everything())

sf_data %>%
  as_grouped_data('depth') %>% 
  flextable() %>%
  set_header_labels(
    depth = 'Depth',
    measurement_name = 'Particle Size',
    usga_spec = 'USGA Spec',
    trend = 'Trend'
  ) %>%
  # add_header_row(
  #   values = c("",'%Retained'),
  #   colwidths = c(3,2)
  # ) %>%
  add_header_lines(
    values = c(
      'OM 246 Sand Fractions'
    )
  ) %>% 
  #border_remove() %>%
  #border(part = "body", border.bottom = officer::fp_border(color = "white", width = 1)) %>%
  #align(part = "all", align = "center") %>%
  fontsize(size = 12, part = "all") %>%
  colformat_double(big.mark = ",", digits = 1, na_str = "") %>% 
  font(fontname = "Rasa", part = "all") %>%
  bold(bold = TRUE, part = "header") %>%
  bold(j = 1, bold = TRUE, part = "body") %>%
  line_spacing(i = 1, space = 1.3, part = "header") %>%
  width(width = .5) %>%
  width(j = c(1, 3), width = 1) %>%
  width(j = 2, width = 2.75) %>%
  hrule(rule = "exact") %>%
  height_all(height = 5)
```
